name: Thomas H Tuberville
stanceSummary: Tuberville has repeatedly framed Hamas as a terrorist threat, opposed Gaza ceasefire calls in his October 2023 floor remarks, and supported sustained U.S. military aid and political backing for Israel.

timeline.event: On the Senate floor, Tuberville said the U.S. should "support Israel and supply Israel," rejected Gaza ceasefire demands, and called for Hamas to be "wiped...off the map."
Tuberville co-sponsored a resolution marking the October 7 attack and reaffirming U.S. commitment to Israel and hostage release.
